title: oberonia multidentata
intro: Oberonia multidentata, also known as the many-toothed orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia multidentata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the roots and leaves in water, and can be used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures.
